sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67969" key="mi/sergos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑ´σ-εργος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67969.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hating work, lazy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.172</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
